patch.value: Tracks GitHub issue #256: pm update-many --dry-run does not validate priority/type/status/deadline, producing false-positive plans that fail on apply. Dry-run must validate identically to apply so the preview accurately reflects whether apply succeeds.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Design (GH-256): UP-FRONT value-validation gate in runUpdateMany (after hasAnyUpdateMutationInput, before runList/checkpoint) reusing apply's resolvers (resolvePriority; resolveTypeName+buildInvalidTypeError; normalizeStatusInput/parseStatus; resolveIsoOrRelative). Throws same PmCliError for BOTH dry-run and apply -> preview==apply, apply fails fast (no orphan checkpoint). Only value/enum/format validation; per-item governance stays in apply. Tests: flip the dry-run-unvalidated-priority test to expect rejection; add priority/type/status/deadline cases both modes; assert no checkpoint on rejection.

value.author: update-many-dryrun-agent
value.text:
GH-256 fixed: pm update-many --dry-run now validates scalar enum/format fields identically to apply (true preview==apply parity), and apply fails fast before creating an orphan checkpoint.

FILES CHANGED:
- src/cli/commands/update-many.ts: added helper assertPlannedUpdateValuesValid(update, settings, statusRegistry, pmRoot). Called in runUpdateMany immediately AFTER the hasAnyUpdateMutationInput check and BEFORE normalizeStatusFilter/runList/checkpoint creation (so it gates BOTH dry-run and apply). Added imports: resolvePriority, resolveItemTypeRegistry+resolveTypeName, buildInvalidTypeError, resolveItemTypesFilePath, resolveIsoOrRelative, getActiveExtensionRegistrations, type PmSettings. Helper exported via _testOnlyUpdateManyCommand.
- tests/unit/commands/update-many-command.spec.ts: flipped the existing 'normalizes scalar preview values' test (priority 'not-numeric' -> valid '3', asserts after:3); added describe block 'rejects globally-invalid scalar values in dry-run and apply (GH-256)' with a table-driven test per field (invalid priority 99 / type BogusType / status BogusStatus / deadline not-a-date) asserting BOTH dry-run and apply reject with EXIT_CODE.USAGE and the same error message, plus no checkpoint dir created (readdir ENOENT) and item priority untouched; added a positive test (valid priority/type/status/deadline) proving dry-run plan + successful apply. Reworked the pre-existing 'records failed rows ... rejected during apply' test: it used invalid --status to provoke a per-item failure, which the new up-front gate now intercepts globally, so it now triggers a genuine per-item failure via strict ownership (preset=custom, ownership_enforcement=strict, foreign-assignee item) -> error 'assigned to foreign-assignee'.

VALIDATORS REUSED (same as update.ts apply path, exact error messages):
- priority: resolvePriority(raw) -> 'Invalid priority "99". Accepted values...'
- type: resolveTypeName + on undefined buildInvalidTypeError(...) with resolveItemTypesFilePath(pmRoot, settings.schema)
- status: normalizeStatusInput(value, statusRegistry); on null -> 'Invalid --status value "X". Allowed: ...'
- deadline: resolveIsoOrRelative(value, new Date(), 'deadline')

SCOPE: only VALUE/ENUM/FORMAT correctness (globally invalid regardless of item). Per-item governance/workflow/ownership rules stay in the apply path (runUpdate). Each field validated only when provided (=== undefined guards).

DISCOVERIES:
- deadline resolver param is a Date (default new Date()); update.ts passes a Date, so I used new Date() not nowIso() (which is a string) to mirror apply exactly.
- resolveGovernanceKnobs ignores raw ownership_enforcement unless preset='custom' (non-custom presets' baseline wins) -- needed in the reworked failure test.
- sandbox: pm refuses --pm-path = project root (redirects to .agents/pm); verified against .agents/pm.

RESULTS: pnpm build + pnpm typecheck pass. Static quality gate passes. tests/unit/commands/update-many-command.spec.ts 45/45 pass. update-many.ts coverage from this spec alone: 100% lines/branches/functions/statements. Manual repro confirmed all four invalid values now ERROR in --dry-run with the exact apply messages and valid values still produce a plan. No commit/push performed; left item open for lead to close.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Integration (lead): verified combined build/typecheck/100%-coverage(28404 stmts)/static/docs/contracts gates green. Added focus action-wrapper + MCP pm_focus dispatch coverage tests to reach 100%. Manual sandbox test: all 4 invalid fields (priority 99 / type BogusType / status BogusStatus / deadline not-a-date) now error in --dry-run with the exact apply messages; valid values still produce a plan; invalid apply creates NO orphan checkpoint.

patch.value: Fixed: pm update-many --dry-run now validates priority/type/status/deadline up-front (reusing apply's resolvers) so the preview matches apply; apply also fails fast without an orphan checkpoint.

Up-front value-validation gate in runUpdateMany reuses apply's resolvers (resolvePriority/resolveTypeName+buildInvalidTypeError/normalizeStatusInput/resolveIsoOrRelative) for priority/type/status/deadline, gating both dry-run and apply.
pm update-many --dry-run rejects invalid field values identically to apply (preview==apply).
dry-run skipped validation and showed false-positive plans that failed on apply.
